Mechanism: Bajaj Finserv holds majority promoter stake in Bajaj Finance. Bajaj Finance is Bajaj Finserv's core asset and drives the dominant share of its consolidated earnings. A BAJFINANCE crash directly destroys BAJAJFINSV book value and reported profits.

State Bank of India holds majority promoter stake in SBI Life Insurance. SBI Life contributes to SBI group consolidated profits and SBI also earns bancassurance distribution fees from it - creating both balance sheet and income exposure.

Grasim Industries holds ~59% promoter stake in UltraTech Cement. UltraTech is Grasim's single largest asset and the primary driver of its consolidated revenue and profits. If ULTRACEMCO falls Grasim's consolidated balance sheet and earnings collapse proportionally. This is the strongest cross-holding in Nifty50.

HDFC Bank inherited a ~6.5% equity stake in HDFC Life Insurance after the merger of HDFC Ltd into HDFC Bank in July 2023. This is a direct on-balance-sheet holding. A fall in HDFCLIFE reduces HDFC Bank investment portfolio value and requires mark-to-market provisioning.
Axis Bank holds a confirmed direct minority equity stake in Max Healthcare Institute as a strategic financial investment. A fall in MAXHEALTH reduces Axis Bank investment book value directly.

Reliance Retail Ventures (wholly owned subsidiary of Reliance Industries) holds a small equity stake in Eternal Ltd (formerly Zomato). A fall in ETERNAL creates a mark-to-market loss in Reliance's consolidated financial statements.
